criminal_summary.case_numbers_xls: FIR No. 3/2012, Vigilance and Anti Corruption Wing Virudhunagar District; Case No. Spl. SC/20/2019, District Sessions Court, Virudhunagar District (E) Srivilliputhur; Under Section 13(2) r/w 13(1)(e) of Prevention and Corruption Act 1988; Brief description: Case for accumulating assets disproportionate to income. (Discharged by Special Court / Principal District Sessions Court under Section 239 of CrPC); Appeal/Revision filed: Yes. The order of discharge under SUO MOTU Criminal Revision Case No.1481/2023 by the Madras High Court was cancelled. Based on that, the Supreme Court of India is investigating and an interim stay order has been issued against the High Court order. (Crl.A.No. 003502 / 2025 SLP (Crl) No: 011664/2024)
